description_long: This object is a rectangular, boxy device with a predominantly light gray body and darker gray accents, featuring a distinctive horizontal vent pattern on the top surface. The front face displays two round controller ports, a power button, a reset button, and a cartridge slot, all arranged in a compact, user-friendly layout. The left side includes additional ports, likely for power and video connections, while the rear and right sides are mostly plain with minimal detailing. The top surface is marked by a series of parallel ventilation slats, providing airflow for internal components. The branding 'Nintendo Entertainment System' is clearly visible on the front, rendered in red and gray text. The overall design is utilitarian, with a hard plastic exterior and a sturdy, compact form factor.
description: A rectangular, gray device with dark accents, front-facing ports, buttons, and a vented top, featuring 'Nintendo Entertainment System' branding. The design is compact, sturdy, and utilitarian with a hard plastic exterior.
description_view_0: The left side view shows a plain surface with visible vent slats on top and a few ports at the bottom left corner.
description_view_1: The rear view is mostly featureless, showing a flat surface with subtle vent details at the bottom edge.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the 'Nintendo Entertainment System' branding, two controller ports, power and reset buttons, and the cartridge slot.
description_view_3: The right side view is plain, with only the vent slats on top and no visible ports or buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: The brand logo 'Nintendo Entertainment System' is visible on the front left of the object, with 'Nintendo' in red and 'Entertainment System' in gray, using a clean, sans-serif font.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is located on the front, featuring two rectangular buttons (power and reset) and two round controller ports, all clearly labeled and spaced for easy access.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: The ventilation pattern consists of parallel horizontal slats on the top right section of the object, providing airflow for cooling.
